description_long: This is a classic wooden baseball bat with a natural brown barrel and a black handle. The barrel displays a smooth, slightly glossy wood grain finish, transitioning to a textured black grip at the handle. The handle appears to be wrapped with a ribbed or grooved grip tape, providing a secure hold for the user. The bat tapers smoothly from the thick barrel to the narrower handle, ending in a rounded knob at the base. There are no visible brand logos, markings, or decals on the barrel or handle. The overall appearance suggests a traditional, well-crafted bat suitable for recreational or professional use in urban parks or sports facilities.
description: A traditional wooden baseball bat with a brown barrel and black, ribbed handle grip, featuring a smooth, glossy finish and no visible markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bat, highlighting the brown wood grain barrel and black handle grip.
description_view_1: End-on view of the barrel, showing the circular cross-section and the transition from the barrel to the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the full length, wood grain, and black grip, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: End-on view of the handle, showing the rounded knob and the ribbed grip texture.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: The grip tape is black, ribbed or grooved, and tightly wrapped around the handle with a consistent texture and no visible designs or logos.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end cap is a simple rounded wooden knob, matching the handle in color and material, with no distinct markings or logos.
